useCasesDescription: Browse curated AI use cases designed for long-tail SEO and product conversion.
useCasesIntro: Browse conversion-oriented pages for specific AI workflows, industries, and content goals.
useCasesEmptyDescription: Publish your first curated use case to start building long-tail SEO pages.
templatesDescription: Browse curated prompt templates designed for search intent and conversion.
templatesIntro: Reusable prompt templates, examples, and variable guides for specific AI tasks.
templatesEmptyDescription: Publish your first prompt template to start building searchable landing content.
alternativesDescription: Browse focused alternative pages for users comparing your product against broader or older tools.
alternativesIntro: High-intent alternative pages designed for switchers who are already evaluating replacement options.
alternativesEmptyDescription: Publish your first alternative page to capture replacement-intent searches.
compareDescription: Browse side-by-side AI product and model comparisons built for decision-stage search intent.
compareIntro: Comparison pages help capture high-intent traffic from users actively choosing between tools, models, and workflows.
compareEmptyDescription: Publish your first comparison page to capture decision-stage search traffic.
